/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard_4am_detect.dir/mockingboard_4am_detect_smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard_4am_detect.dir/__/Mockingboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard_4am_detect.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard_4am_detect.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard_4am_detect.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard_4am_detect.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard_4am_detect.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard_4am_detect.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard_4am_detect.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o -o test_mockingboard_4am_detect  -ldl -lm
